raw_data.details: The “Dr. S. K. Sharma (Ph. D. Mathematics)” scheme is implemented by Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar, under the Department of Agriculture, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to deserving scholars pursuing a Ph. D. in Mathematics, supporting advanced research and reducing their financial burden.
raw_data.benefits: Amount of Financial Assistance: ₹25,000 per year.
raw_data.eligibility: The applicant must be a student. The applicant must be enrolled in a Ph. D. program in Mathematics at Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar. The financial assistance is provided for a duration of one year only.
raw_data.application_process: OfflineStudents are first invited to submit their applications on the prescribed form. A committee, constituted by the Vice Chancellor, then reviews and evaluates these applications following a defined procedure. Based on the committee’s recommendations, the Vice Chancellor grants approval, after which the selected students receive the payments.
raw_data.documents_required: Documents are required in accordance with the university guidelines prescribed for this scheme.

To know more please visit CancelApply NowIt seems you have already initiated your application earlier. To know more please visit Check EligibilityUttarakhandDr. S. K. Sharma (Ph. D. Mathematics)MathematicsPhDStudentDetailsThe “Dr. S. K. Sharma (Ph. D. Mathematics)” scheme is implemented by Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar, under the Department of Agriculture, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to deserving scholars pursuing a Ph. D. in Mathematics, supporting advanced research and reducing their financial burden. BenefitsAmount of Financial Assistance: ₹25,000 per year. EligibilityThe applicant must be a student. The applicant must be enrolled in a Ph. D. program in Mathematics at Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar. The financial assistance is provided for a duration of one year only. Application ProcessOfflineStudents are first invited to submit their applications on the prescribed form. A committee, constituted by the Vice Chancellor, then reviews and evaluates these applications following a defined procedure. Based on the committee’s recommendations, the Vice Chancellor grants approval, after which the selected students receive the payments. Documents RequiredDocuments are required in accordance with the university guidelines prescribed for this scheme. Frequently Asked QuestionsWho is eligible to apply for the scheme? Applicants must be students enrolled in a Ph. D. program in Mathematics at Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar. What is the amount of financial assistance provided? The scheme provides financial assistance of ₹25,000 per year. For how long is the financial assistance awarded? The assistance is provided for a duration of one year only. How can students apply for the scheme? Students are invited to submit their applications on the prescribed form made available by the university. Who evaluates the applications? A committee constituted by the Vice Chancellor reviews and evaluates the applications following a defined procedure. How are the final selections made? Based on the committee’s recommendations, the Vice Chancellor grants approval, after which the selected students receive the scholarship payments. Sources And References[Guideline (Page No. 185)](https://uk.gov.in/department92/library_file/file-30-01-2025-04-25-16.pdf)OkWas this helpful?

faqs.question: Who is eligible to apply for the scheme?
faqs.answer: Applicants must be students enrolled in a Ph. D. program in Mathematics at Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar.

faqs.question: What is the amount of financial assistance provided?
faqs.answer: The scheme provides financial assistance of ₹25,000 per year.

faqs.question: For how long is the financial assistance awarded?
faqs.answer: The assistance is provided for a duration of one year only.

faqs.question: How can students apply for the scheme?
faqs.answer: Students are invited to submit their applications on the prescribed form made available by the university.

faqs.question: Who evaluates the applications?
faqs.answer: A committee constituted by the Vice Chancellor reviews and evaluates the applications following a defined procedure.

faqs.question: How are the final selections made?
faqs.answer: Based on the committee’s recommendations, the Vice Chancellor grants approval, after which the selected students receive the scholarship payments.
